if.test: searchType != null and searchKeyword != null and searchKeyword != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT f.HASH_ID AS FIND_ID, f.TARGET_ID AS TARGET_ID, t.NAME AS TARGET_NAME, f.PATH AS FILE_PATH, SUBSTRING_INDEX(f.PATH, '/', -1) AS FILE_NAME, pd.DATA_TYPE AS DATATYPE_NAME, pd.DATA_TYPE AS PATTERN_NAME, f.PERSONAL_INFO AS MATCH_DATA, pd.MATCH_COUNT AS MATCH_COUNT, IFNULL(dp_latest.APPROVAL_STATUS, 'NONE') AS PROCESS_STATUS, dp_latest.PROCESSING_FLAG AS PROCESS_TYPE, dp_latest.USER_NO AS PROCESS_USER, dp_latest.REGDATE AS PROCESS_DT, f.CREDATE AS FIND_DT, f.REGDATE AS REG_DT, CASE IFNULL(dp_latest.APPROVAL_STATUS, 'NONE') WHEN 'W' THEN '대기' WHEN 'Y' THEN '승인' WHEN 'N' THEN '반려' ELSE '미처리' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_LABEL, pd.DATA_TYPE AS DATATYPE_LABEL FROM pi_find f LEFT JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_path_data pd ON pd.TARGET_ID = f.TARGET_ID AND pd.AP_NO = f.AP_NO AND pd.HASH_ID = f.HASH_ID LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp_latest ON dp_latest.TARGET_ID = f.TARGET_ID AND dp_latest.HASH_ID = f.HASH_ID AND dp_latest.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX = ( SELECT MAX(dp2.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX) FROM pi_data_processing dp2 WHERE dp2.TARGET_ID = f.TARGET_ID AND dp2.HASH_ID = f.HASH_ID )
ORDER BY f.CREDATE DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pi_find f LEFT JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp_latest ON dp_latest.TARGET_ID = f.TARGET_ID AND dp_latest.HASH_ID = f.HASH_ID AND dp_latest.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX = ( SELECT MAX(dp2.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX) FROM pi_data_processing dp2 WHERE dp2.TARGET_ID = f.TARGET_ID AND dp2.HASH_ID = f.HASH_ID )

SELECT f.HASH_ID AS FIND_ID, f.TARGET_ID AS TARGET_ID, t.NAME AS TARGET_NAME, f.PATH AS FILE_PATH, SUBSTRING_INDEX(f.PATH, '/', -1) AS FILE_NAME, pd.DATA_TYPE AS DATATYPE_NAME, pd.DATA_TYPE AS PATTERN_NAME, f.PERSONAL_INFO AS MATCH_DATA, pd.MATCH_COUNT AS MATCH_COUNT, IFNULL(dp_latest.APPROVAL_STATUS, 'NONE') AS PROCESS_STATUS, dp_latest.PROCESSING_FLAG AS PROCESS_TYPE, dp_latest.USER_NO AS PROCESS_USER, dp_latest.REGDATE AS PROCESS_DT, f.CREDATE AS FIND_DT, f.REGDATE AS REG_DT, CASE IFNULL(dp_latest.APPROVAL_STATUS, 'NONE') WHEN 'W' THEN '대기' WHEN 'Y' THEN '승인' WHEN 'N' THEN '반려' ELSE '미처리' END AS PROCESS_STATUS_LABEL, pd.DATA_TYPE AS DATATYPE_LABEL FROM pi_find f LEFT JOIN pi_targets t ON f.TARGET_ID = t.TARGET_ID AND f.AP_NO = t.AP_NO LEFT JOIN pi_path_data pd ON pd.TARGET_ID = f.TARGET_ID AND pd.AP_NO = f.AP_NO AND pd.HASH_ID = f.HASH_ID LEFT JOIN pi_data_processing dp_latest ON dp_latest.TARGET_ID = f.TARGET_ID AND dp_latest.HASH_ID = f.HASH_ID AND dp_latest.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX = ( SELECT MAX(dp2.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX) FROM pi_data_processing dp2 WHERE dp2.TARGET_ID = f.TARGET_ID AND dp2.HASH_ID = f.HASH_ID ) WHERE f.HASH_ID = #{findId} LIMIT 1

SELECT dp.DATA_PROCESSING_IDX AS processId, dp.HASH_ID AS findId, dp.PROCESSING_FLAG AS processType, dp.APPROVAL_STATUS AS processResult, dp.USER_NO AS processUser, dp.NOTEPAD AS processComment, dp.REGDATE AS processDt FROM pi_data_processing dp WHERE dp.HASH_ID = #{findId} ORDER BY dp.REGDATE DESC

SELECT sp.NODE_ID AS subpathId, sp.TARGET_ID AS targetId, sp.PARENT_ID AS parentId, sp.PATH AS filePath, sp.PATH AS fileName, sp.OWNER AS owner, sp.GROUP_ID AS groupId, sp.AP_NO AS apNo, sp.ACCOUNT AS account FROM pi_subpath sp WHERE sp.TARGET_ID = #{targetId} ORDER BY sp.PATH ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pi_data_processing ( TARGET_ID, HASH_ID, AP_NO, PROCESSING_FLAG, APPROVAL_STATUS, APPROVAL_TYPE, USER_NO, NOTEPAD, REGDATE ) SELECT f.TARGET_ID, f.HASH_ID, f.AP_NO, #{processType}, 'W', #{processType}, #{processUser}, #{processComment}, NOW() FROM pi_find f WHERE f.HASH_ID = #{findId} LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO pi_data_processing ( TARGET_ID, HASH_ID, AP_NO, PROCESSING_FLAG, APPROVAL_STATUS, APPROVAL_TYPE, USER_NO, NOTEPAD, REGDATE ) SELECT f.TARGET_ID, f.HASH_ID, f.AP_NO, #{remediationType}, 'W', #{remediationType}, #{processUser}, #{processComment}, NOW() FROM pi_find f WHERE f.HASH_ID = #{findId} LIMIT 1
